They require high shrub cover grass litter cover relatively large patches.
Loss sagebrush high-intensity, high-frequency wildfires because invasive grasses adversely affected Sagebrush Sparrows.
They avoid densely-growing, annual invasive plants, such cheatgrass.

transport list shown above contains name Jackson Boskat wrote about mother, Mary, yesterday Sunday's Obituary.

name transport George Washington, date sailing 1918, Port Hoboken, Jersey.

military service number 1917862, Engineer.

this transport record members Company "D", 307th Engineers.

They headed Camp Upton, Brooklyn, York looks like they arrived 1919.

"Each season story," Lyon, France-based designer Marie Colin-Mad tells Co.Design collection silk square scarves, printed with intricately rendered abstract paintings.
name label look like jibberish-or least excessive-to non-French speakers, simply means "1984," birth year designers, Colin-Mad partner Amélie Charroin.
It's also year that Eric Rohmer's "Les Nuits Pleine Lune" released, film which designers named their artful collection.
Some scarf designs channel Piet Mondrian with geometric patterns.
Other silken images dreamy surreal: prints floating exit signs, matches, crumpled plastic bags, psychedelic lightning storm.
Part what makes these pieces unique that they don't feature repeating patterns motifs, like many textiles, instead, each printed with large, single image, which folds into abstract jumble colors when worn.
paint draw photomontage hand," says Colin-Mad.
Then designers silkscreen their bold, original images onto 51-inch silk squares.
Often modeled like modernist capes, they could just easily hung wall colorful tapestries.
collection available concept stores high-end boutiques Paris, Tokyo, Berlin, York, Madrid, Copenhagen, with prices starting about $250.
